name: orangutan_chr19_centromere
description: Pongo abelii chr19 centromere / pericentromere. Alpha-satellite higher-order repeat (HOR) array; 6-monomer HOR unit (~1026 bp). T2T-resolved alpha-sat array; flanked by ape-lineage PongoSAT satellite blocks. Centromere mapping is HOR-aware; LLmap should refuse to silently collapse cross-species divergence here.
expected_copy_count: thousands of 171 bp alpha-satellite monomers in 6-mer HOR units, tandemly arrayed over 4.5 Mb
